name: Bicycle Stunt Racing Game 3D
description: Welcome to the bicycle stunt racing game. Get ready to hit the tracks, pedal hard, and race your way to the top in Extreme Cycle Racing, the ultimate cycling game that combines speed, skills, and adrenaline. Are you ready to take on the challenge and become the ultimate cycling champion? Unlock new cycles with better speed, handling, and control as you progress. Race against the opponents to complete tracks as fast as possible.
instructions: W Arrow Up rarr Move Front S Arrow Down rarr Move Back A Arrow Left rarr Move Left D Arrow Right rarr Move Right - To click any button use mouse
